items.title: US to announce deal allowing Saudi Arabia a nuclear programme
items.summary: The agreement would fulfil a long-held Saudi ambition but could attract concern in Israel and from some US lawmakers.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Threatens Retaliation Against Civilian Targets if Iran Strikes in Strait
items.summary: President Trump said the United States would target a bridge or power plant, including in or near the Iranian capital, if Iran fired on the Strait of Hormuz.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Why the U.S. and Saudi Arabia signed a nuclear agreement
items.summary: NPR has confirmed a deal that would allow the U.S. to transfer nuclear technology to Saudi Arabia and allow the country to begin enriching uranium for civilian use.
